name: wild-talents-2e
description: Wild Talents 2nd Edition system for Foundry VTT

scripts.build:packs: npm run build:pack:archetypes && npm run build:pack:weapons && npm run build:pack:powers
scripts.build:pack:archetypes: fvtt package pack -n archetypes --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in src/packs/archetypes --out packs
scripts.build:pack:weapons: fvtt package pack -n weapons --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in src/packs/weapons --out packs
scripts.build:pack:powers: fvtt package pack -n powers --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in src/packs/powers --out packs
scripts.unpack: npm run unpack:archetypes && npm run unpack:weapons && npm run unpack:powers
scripts.unpack:archetypes: fvtt package unpack -n archetypes --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in packs/archetypes --out src/packs/archetypes
scripts.unpack:weapons: fvtt package unpack -n weapons --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in packs/weapons --out src/packs/weapons
scripts.unpack:powers: fvtt package unpack -n powers --type System --id wild-talents-2e --in packs/powers --out src/packs/powers
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:packs
